entities.name: MELOIDOGYNE JAVANICA
entities.description: A root-knot nematode that is an important parasite of field crops in the tropics

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS STRIATA
entities.description: A bacterium, specifically strain 303, whose culture filtrates are lethal to M. javanica eggs

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS AWAMORI
entities.description: A fungus whose culture filtrates reduce the egg hatch of M. javanica

entities.name: TRICHODERMA HARZIANUM
entities.description: A fungus, specifically strain OPT NAB, whose culture filtrates reduce the egg hatch of M. javanica

entities.name: TRICHODERMA VIRIDE
entities.description: A fungus whose culture filtrates reduce the egg hatch of M. javanica

entities.name: EGG HATCH
entities.description: The process of nematode eggs hatching into second-stage juveniles, which can be inhibited by certain microbial filtrates

entities.name: CULTURE FILTRATES
entities.description: The use of filtered liquid from microbial cultures to screen for inhibitory effects on nematode egg hatch

entities.name: FIELD CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural crops that are parasitized by the root-knot nematode Meloidogyne javanica

entities.name: TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where Meloidogyne javanica is a significant parasite

entities.name: NEMATODE MANAGEMENT STRATEGY
entities.description: The development of eco-friendly options to manage and control nematode populations

relationships.description: significantly reduces egg hatch of M. javanica by up to 95%
